violations.text: The wall by the mop sink, and the wall by the side door in the storage room is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025

Milk was observed held between 48-51 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. The milk cooler was observed holding an ambient temperature of 51 DF. Per PIC, milk has been in cooler since Monday and was voluntarily disposed of at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/19/2025
The wall by the mop sink, and the wall by the side door in the storage room is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 06/19/2025

The Ceiling tiles in the back storage area are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. All ceiling tiles that are stained missing or in poor repair must be replaced. The wall under the electric panel is in poor repair. Physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Establishment is to provide pictures of repairs to RIDOH. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2023
